chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5893 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "جَاهِدْ هَوَاكَ كَمَا تُجَاهِدُ عَدُوَّكَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5893 - Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Struggle against your desires just as you struggle against your enemy."
